seo_description: Current time in Perth, Australia — live AWST clock (UTC+8), no Daylight Saving Time, and time differences with Sydney, London, New York, and Singapore.

faq.question: What time is it in Perth right now?
faq.answer: Perth, Western Australia uses Australian Western Standard Time (AWST, UTC+8) year-round. Western Australia does not observe Daylight Saving Time, unlike the eastern states. The IANA identifier is Australia/Perth. Perth is the same time zone as Singapore and Beijing.

faq.question: What time zone is Perth in?
faq.answer: Perth is in the Australian Western Standard Time zone (AWST, UTC+8). Unlike Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane — which use AEST (UTC+10) or AEDT (UTC+11) — Perth stays on UTC+8 year-round with no DST. This makes Perth a convenient reference: it aligns with Singapore (SGT, UTC+8) and Hong Kong (HKT, UTC+8) at all times.

faq.question: Does Perth observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Perth and Western Australia do not observe Daylight Saving Time. Western Australia held a DST trial from 2006 to 2009, but a 2009 referendum rejected permanent DST by 55% to 45%. As a result, Perth remains on AWST (UTC+8) year-round, while eastern Australia switches between AEST (UTC+10) and AEDT (UTC+11).

faq.question: What is the time difference between Perth and Sydney?
faq.answer: Perth (AWST, UTC+8) is 2 hours behind Sydney (AEST, UTC+10) during eastern Australia's standard time. During Sydney's Daylight Saving Time (AEDT, UTC+11, October–April), Perth is 3 hours behind. Because Perth has no DST and Sydney does, the gap oscillates between 2 and 3 hours depending on the time of year.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Perth and London?
faq.answer: Perth (AWST, UTC+8) is 8 hours ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in UK winter. During UK summer (BST, UTC+1), Perth is 7 hours ahead of London. Perth's lack of DST means the gap varies only based on what London does.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Perth and New York?
faq.answer: Perth (AWST, UTC+8) is 13 hours ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US Daylight Saving Time (EDT, UTC-4), Perth is 12 hours ahead. The significant east-west gap means Perth business hours overlap minimally with US working hours — Perth afternoons align with US mornings.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Perth?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Perth are 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM AWST, Monday through Friday. Perth is Western Australia's capital and a major hub for the mining and resources sector. The ASX (Australian Securities Exchange) in Sydney opens at 10:00 AM AEST (8:00 AM AWST). Perth's alignment with Asian time zones (Singapore at UTC+8) makes it well-positioned for trade with Southeast and East Asia.

faq.question: Is Perth time the same as Singapore time?
faq.answer: Yes. Perth (AWST, UTC+8) is on the same time zone as Singapore (SGT, UTC+8) year-round. Both cities are at UTC+8 with no Daylight Saving Time. When it is noon in Singapore, it is also noon in Perth. This makes Perth uniquely positioned among Australian cities to trade with Singapore and Southeast Asia with zero time difference.
